implementation_rule: Prefer NumPy/pandas operations over Python loops for arrays and DataFrames
Use built-in functions such as sum, min, max, sort where possible
Use lists for changing collections; tuples for fixed immutable records
append adds one object; extend adds each element from an iterable
Square brackets index/slice or define lists; parentheses call functions or define tuples
Parse date columns on read_csv when using time series
loc is label-based; iloc is integer-position-based
Zero is a value; None/NaN means missing or undefined
Use pathlib/glob patterns to load matching files such as many CSVs
